zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Boyce於1428年出生在英國英格蘭肯特古德內斯同時，他的父親John de Bois28歲，母親Agnes26歲。他於1451年與Edith在英國英格蘭肯特古德內斯同結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1479年在英國英格蘭肯特享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特波寧頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Boyce于1428年出生在英国英格兰肯特古德內斯同时，他的父亲John de Bois28岁，母亲Agnes26岁。他于1451年与Edith在英国英格兰肯特古德內斯同结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1479年在英国英格兰肯特享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特波寧頓。

nameMeanings.name: Boyce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (mainly Donegal): of Norman origin, a habitational name from from one or more places in Normandy named with Old French bois ‘wood, grove’, especially Bois-Arnault and Bus-Saint-Rémy (Eure), and Bosc-le-Hard (Seine-Maritime), each of which is known to have given its name to an aristocratic Norman family in England. The name was taken by the Normans from England to Ireland, where it was also adopted to Anglicize Irish Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).
English: variant of Bush , influenced by Old French bois in 1 above, or else a translation of this term.

variants.name: Boice
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Boyce  .

variants.name: Boise
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Boyce  . This form of the surname is common in the US but rare in Britain.

variants.name: Boys
meanings: English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .
Probably also an Americanized form of French   Bois  .

variants.name: Boyse
meanings: English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

variants.name: Bogue
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhaigh ‘descendant of Buadhach’, a personal name meaning ‘victorious’. The final fricative has been delenited in Bogue, the southern (Cork) Anglicized form of the surname. (The ancient British name Boudicca or Boadicea, borne by the Queen of the Iceni who in AD 62 led a revolt against the Roman occupation of her country, is a cognate.)
Scottish: habitational name from Bogue in the parish of Minnigaff (Kirkcudbrightshire). The name is now common in Ulster.

variants.name: Buss
meanings: English (Sussex and Kent), of Norman origin: variant of   Boyce   alias   Bush  .
English: alternatively from Middle English, Old French busse ‘cask, barrel’, perhaps a metonymic occupational name for a cooper or a nickname for a large, rotund man.
German: from a short form of the personal name Bushard (see Bosshart ). This surname is also found in Poland.

variants.name: Buist
meanings: Scottish (Fife, Angus, and Perthshire): variant of   Boyce  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Boyce was born in 1428, in Goodnestone, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Bois, was 28 and his mother, Agnes, was 26. He married Edith in 1451, in Goodnestone, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1479, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in Bonnington, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Boyce est né en 1428, à Goodnestone, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Bois, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Edith en 1451, à Goodnestone, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1479, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Bonnington, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Boyce 1428 in Goodnestone, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Bois 28 und seine Mutter Agnes 26. Er hat 1451 in Goodnestone, Kent, England, United Kingdom Edith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1479 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bonnington, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Boyce è nato il nel 1428 nel Goodnestone, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Bois, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Agnes, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Edith nel 1451, nel Goodnestone, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1479, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Bonnington, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Boyceが1428年にイギリスイギリスケントグドネストーンで生まれた時，父John de Boisは28歳，母Agnesは26歳であった。1451年にイギリスイギリスケントグドネストーンでEdithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1479年にイギリスイギリスケントで51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントボニントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Boyce(이)가 1428년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 구드네스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Bois(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1451년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 구드네스톤에서 Edith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1479년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 보닝턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Boyce nasceu em 1428, em Goodnestone, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Bois, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Edith em 1451, em Goodnestone, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1479, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Bonnington, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Boyce родился в 1428 г. в местности гуднестоун, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Bois было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Edith в 1451 г. в местности гуднестоун, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1479 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности боннингтон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Boyce nació en 1428, en Goodnestone, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Bois, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Agnes, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Edith en 1451, en Goodnestone, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1479, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Bonnington, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
